_comment: MMD finger rest directions (first segment of each finger: root -> next), measured from a real reference PMX. Used by step 1.7 (align_fingers_to_canonical). Directions are in armature-local space (Blender right-handed Z-up), unit length. Run after step 1.6 (align_arms_to_canonical) so the wrist frame is already aligned.
source: measured from Purifier Inase 18 None.pmx rest pose
